subtasks.title: Implement final schema and migrations
subtasks.details: Create migration set for s004_option_chain, s004_option_greeks, s004_strike_scores, s004_liquidity_zones, s004_trade_recommendations, and s004_live_trades.
acceptance_criteria: Migrations run clean in fresh and incremental environments.
questions: Alembic migrations or SQL-first migration runner?

subtasks.title: Containerize platform and local stack
subtasks.details: Create Dockerfiles and docker-compose setup for api, worker, websocket, redis, postgres, and frontend.
questions: Need separate compose profiles for paper-only vs live modes?

subtasks.title: Prepare Kubernetes deployment baseline
subtasks.details: Add manifests or helm charts with autoscaling, probes, secrets, and config maps.
acceptance_criteria: Health probes and rolling updates verified.

subtasks.title: Add monitoring and alerting
subtasks.details: Instrument services with Prometheus metrics; build Grafana dashboards and alert rules for latency, errors, disconnect rates, and queue lag.
questions: Who receives production incident alerts and escalation policy?

subtasks.title: Run performance and release readiness tests
subtasks.details: Execute load and soak tests against PRD SLAs and prepare go-live checklist with rollback plan.
acceptance_criteria: SLA report generated for all PRD targets.
Go-live checklist signed by engineering and product.
questions: Minimum duration for soak testing before production launch?
